target_market_label.zh: 汤加（能源部 / 电力有限公司）
target_market_label.zht: 湯加（能源部 / 電力有限公司）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入汤加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入湯加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Tonga Department of Energy (Ministry of Public Enterprises) and Tonga Power Limited (TPL) context, IEC-based interconnection references, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, IEC 63056 second-life battery requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and a 240/415 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与汤加能源部（公共企业部）与汤加电力有限公司（TPL）要求、基于IEC的并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、IEC 63056二次利用电池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及240/415V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與湯加能源部（公共企業部）與湯加電力有限公司（TPL）要求、基於IEC的併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、IEC 63056二次利用電池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及240/415V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DoE policy determination, TPL interconnection review prerequisite, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Tonga Department of Energy (Ministry of Public Enterprises) requirements, Tonga Power Limited interconnection conditions, SBS-style utility interconnection practices, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、能源部政策裁定、TPL并网审查先决条件、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行汤加能源部（公共企业部）要求、汤加电力有限公司并网条件、SBS式公用事业并网惯例、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、能源部政策裁定、TPL併網審查先決條件、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行湯加能源部（公共企業部）要求、湯加電力有限公司併網條件、SBS式公用事業併網慣例、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Tonga does not yet have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation; its framework is still nascent and implementation is reference-led. BESS projects are primarily assessed through DOE oversight, Tonga Power Limited (TPL) interconnection review, and project-owner/utility specifications that reference IEC standards. For Chinese BESS exported to Tonga, the practical gaps are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence required in project assessments — China GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 are not accepted substitutes; (2) IEC 62933 system-level performance and safety requirements referenced in grid interconnection approvals; (3) IEC 63056 where refurbished or second-life cells are used; (4) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation compliance where required for building and installation approval; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documentation mandatory under international dangerous-goods conventions for sea freight via Nuku'alofa; (6) voltage configuration: Tonga’s grid is 240/415 V 50 Hz while China is 220/380 V 50 Hz — frequency matches but nominal voltage differs and PCS must be configured accordingly; and (7) coastal environmental derating for heat, humidity, and salt exposure. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in Tonga DOE/TPL and utility-led review.
answer_first.zh: 汤加尚无全面的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，监管体系仍处于起步阶段，主要以引用性要求和项目实践为主。BESS项目主要通过能源部监管、汤加电力有限公司（TPL）并网审查及引用IEC标准的项目业主/公用事业技术规范来推进。中国BESS出口汤加的实际差距包括：（1）项目评估要求的IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——中国GB 38031 / GB/T 36276不被接受为替代标准；（2）在并网批准中引用的IEC 62933系统级性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用电芯时IEC 63056要求；（4）建筑和安装审批中按要求执行NFPA 855消防安全安装要求；（5）通过努库阿洛法海运所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输文件，属国际危险品公约强制要求；（6）电压配置：汤加电网为240/415V 50 Hz，而中国为220/380V 50 Hz——两者频率均为50 Hz，但额定电压不同，储能变流器须相应配置；（7）沿岸高湿高热环境中的降额处理。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是制造基准，但在汤加DOE/TPL或公用事业评审中不被接受为IEC证据替代。
answer_first.zht: 湯加尚無全面的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，監管體系仍處於起步階段，主要以引用性要求和項目實踐為主。BESS項目主要透過能源部監管、湯加電力有限公司（TPL）併網審查及引用IEC標準的項目業主/公用事業技術規範來推進。中國BESS出口湯加的實際差距包括：（1）項目評估要求的IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——中國GB 38031 / GB/T 36276不被接受為替代標準；（2）在併網批准中引用的IEC 62933系統級性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用電芯時IEC 63056要求；（4）建築和安裝審批中按要求執行NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求；（5）通過努庫阿洛法海運所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸文件，屬國際危險品公約強制要求；（6）電壓配置：湯加電網為240/415V 50 Hz，而中國為220/380V 50 Hz——兩者頻率均為50 Hz，但額定電壓不同，儲能變流器須相應配置；（7）沿岸高濕高熱環境中的降額處理。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在湯加DOE/TPL或公用事業評審中不被接受為IEC證據替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
